payload.description: The bishop re-rendered in the target watercolor style, side by side with its source.

before.label: Source render
before.caption: the Cburnett white bishop, clean render on paper

after.label: Target style
after.caption: a wtrclrchess style white bishop, soft watercolor edges, plain background

provenance.method: Rendered locally by tools/make_media.py (just make-media): wB.svg rasterized, then restyled with layered watercolor washes, edge pooling, ink linework, and paper grain. Deterministic seed.
provenance.source: web/public/pieces/wB.svg by Colin M.L. Burnett, CC BY-SA 3.0
provenance.license: Derivative of the CC BY-SA 3.0 piece set; see docs/licenses.md.

payload.note: An inspectable before/after pair for the style-transfer story. Composed programmatically in this repo; no diffusion model produced these. Live FLUX generation stays presenter-controlled and optional.
